scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer (mentioned in gold standard) and the general approach, but omits the key data schema details the gold standard focuses on: application databag fields (name, model, port) and unit databag (host). The URL pattern shown differs slightly from gold standard (missing port component).
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, is_ready(), event.url, self.ingress.url — these specific API details are not verifiable from the gold standard, which explicitly notes the Python API is documented in the traefik-k8s-operator repo, not charmlibs. These may be real but cannot be confirmed; the gold standard only names IngressPerAppRequirer as an example class.
